form.formComment: Yet to break through in 10 runs, the latest effort a second over 300m at this track in 18.09. Has been in the placings at her last two starts. Expected to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Muzzle became dislodged during the race.

form.formComment: Last start finished last in a Maiden on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Spitfire George beaten 6 lengths (18.26). Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: First starter by Tommy Shelby from Rosa Rebel. From the Mark Knowles kennel. The market will give the best guide to her chances.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 5th on April 8 over 300m at this track behind Zipping Nuttall beaten 7 lengths (18.11) in a Maiden. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Has struggled to jump cleanly in recent outings and the results have been disappointing, the most recent effort a sixth over 300m at this track. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out across heels entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Has only been in the placings once from nine starts. Last raced when fourth over 300m at this track a week ago. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Came together entering the back straight.
Began awkwardly; Exiting the back straight checked off heels.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th in a Maiden on April 11 over 300m at this track behind Hollies Hayley beaten 8 lengths (18.30). Must be included.

form.formComment: Returns from a four months spell after being tipped out on the back of a fifth (20.94) over 366m at Capalaba. Looks to have the job ahead.
